properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 89/15
NORWEGIAN SEA

1. ONE SCIENTIFIC ROCKET WILL BE LAUNCHED FROM ANDOEYA SPACE CENTER IN THE PERIOD FROM SEPTEMBER 7TH TO SEPTEMBER 21TH 2015.
THE LAUNCHING WILL BE CONDUCTED BETWEEN 19:00 HRS AND 24:00 HRS. LOCAL TIME WITHIN THE ANNOUNCED PERIOD.

SEAGOING TRAFFIC ARE REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING TWO HAZARD AREAS:

AREA 1:
A. 69-31.0N 15-42.0E
B. 69-19.0N 15-53.0E
C. 69-17.5N 15-59.0E
D. 69-18.0N 16-02.5E
E. 69-21.0N 16-04.0E
F. 69-32.0N 15-50.5E
G. 69-31.0N 15-42.0E

AREA 2:
A. 74-06.0N 10-20.0E
B. 72-36.0N 06-18.0E
C. 70-35.0N 09-17.0E
D. 70-24.0N 15-06.0E
E. 71-59.0N 18-57.0E
F. 73-45.0N 16-06.0E
G. 74-06.0N 10-20.0E

REFER NORWEGIAN NOTICE TO MARINERS 16/15
